items.raw_desc: Switch TP-Link SG5428XMPP, Omada: A switch is an active network unit connecting individual devices and other network elements. It is designed for coordinating network traffic. The TP-Link SG5428XMPP, Omada SDN is supposed to be installed in a rack. This model impresses with a switching capacity of 128 Gb/s. The Switch is equipped with 24 × RJ-45 ports that provide connection with network elements. 10/100/1000Base-T technology allows file transfer with a speed of up to 1000 Mbit/s. The switch dimensions are 440 × 330 × 44mm. QoS aka Quality of Service technology guarantees the switch stays within its capacity,  and it also enables you to control end station priority. The TP-Link device works with PoE technology, which provides power and signal connection to end devices with just one LAN cable. The weight of the switch is 4970g. The TP-Link SG5428XMPP, Omada SDN also operates on the ISO/OSI model network layer,  which means it can double as a router. Thanks to this neat feature, you won't need another network element. items.raw_desc: Klórozó CF GROUP ICS16 MEDIUM - automatikus adagolóállomás:The automatic dosing station ICS16 MEDIUM is an intelligent inverter salt chlorinator that takes care of the disinfection of your pool water. The Solinator provides efficient, economical and environmentally friendly production of chlorine gas directly from pool salt, eliminating the need to add traditional chemicals to the pool. In addition, the device automatically measures and adjusts the pH value so that the pool water has the optimal chemical balance and is thus as gentle as possible on your eyes and skin. The dosing station is easy to operate thanks to clear LED indication and an intuitive touch screen. Thanks to Wi-Fi connectivity, you can also easily control the device using the InverGo mobile app. The ICS16 MEDIUM is designed for pools with a water volume of up to 65 m³ and can produce 16 grams of chlorine per hour. items.raw_desc: Switch TP-Link SG5452XMPP, Omada:A network switch is a functional network element connecting individual devices and other network elements. It is designed for controlling network traffic. The TP-Link SG5452XMPP, Omada SDN is supposed to be installed in a rack. This model impresses with a switching capacity of 176 Gb/s. The Switch is equipped with 48 × RJ-45 ports that facilitate connection with network elements. 10/100/1000Base-T technology enables file transfer with a speed of up to 1000 Mbit/s. The switch dimensions are 440 × 330 × 44mm. QoS or Quality of Service technology makes sure the switch doesn't get overloaded,  and it also allows you to set up end station priority. The TP-Link device works with PoE technology, which provides power and signal connection to end devices with a single LAN cable. The switch weighs 5700g. The TP-Link SG5452XMPP, Omada SDN likewise operates on the ISO/OSI model network layer,  meaning it can serve as a router. Thanks to this useful function,  you won't require another network element.
